mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS verification_post_id, c.id AS challenge_id, c.host_id AS host_id, c.title AS challenge_title, c.verification_method AS verification_method, p.certification_status AS previous_post_status, p.contents AS post_content, p.certification_image_url AS thumbnail_url FROM certification_posts p JOIN challenge_participants cp ON cp.id = p.challenge_participant_id JOIN challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ai_ticket_subscriptions WHERE host_id = #{hostId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND started_at <= now() AND expired_at > now() )
SELECT image_url FROM certification_post_images WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_review_results ( challenge_id, host_id, verification_post_id, review_mode, status, previous_post_status, new_post_status ) VALUES ( #{challengeId}, #{hostId}, #{verificationPostId}, #{reviewMode}, #{status}, #{previousPostStatus}, #{newPostStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, challenge_id, host_id, verification_post_id, review_mode, decision, confidence, reason, raw_response, status, previous_post_status, new_post_status, created_at FROM ai_review_results WHERE verification_post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_review_results SET decision = NULL, confidence = NULL, reason = NULL, raw_response = NULL, status = 'PROCESSING', new_post_status = previous_post_status WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'FAILED'
UPDATE ai_review_results SET status = 'FAILED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'
UPDATE certification_posts SET certification_status = #{newStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND certification_status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE ai_review_results SET decision = #{decision}, confidence = #{confidence}, reason = #{reason}, raw_response = CAST(#{rawResponse} AS jsonb), status = #{status}, new_post_status = #{newPostStatus} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'
mapper.select: SELECT id, challenge_id, host_id, verification_post_id, review_mode, decision, confidence, reason, raw_response, status, previous_post_status, new_post_status, created_at FROM ai_review_results WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, challenge_id, host_id, verification_post_id, review_mode, decision, confidence, reason, raw_response, status, previous_post_status, new_post_status, created_at FROM ai_review_results WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
